caption: Two men are seated side-by-side in an indoor setting, appearing in a reaction-style video. The man on the left wears a grey t-shirt and maintains a skeptical facial expression, while the man on the right wears a similar grey t-shirt and a necklace, resting his chin on his hand. They are positioned in front of a large television screen that displays the text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS" in glowing yellow letters. Behind them, a shelf is filled with numerous CDs or DVDs. An inset video window plays in the center of the screen, showing a cinematic scene with figures in a courtyard. As the video progresses, the content of the inset window shifts, showing different angles of a character in a flowing purple garment moving through a scene. The two men remain mostly stationary, their focused and unimpressed expressions barely changing as they watch the footage.
